--- 
title: "Session 24"
name: Dhruvi Sheth 22294
date: "16 March, 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
--- 

```{r}
## Two Way ANOVA Example

# Load dataset
data("PlantGrowth")
head(PlantGrowth)

# Add a second factor for demonstration (e.g., light condition: Low, High)
set.seed(123)
PlantGrowth$Light <- rep(c("Low", "High"), each=5, length.out=nrow(PlantGrowth))
PlantGrowth$Light <- factor(PlantGrowth$Light)

```
```{r}
str(PlantGrowth)
``` 

```{r}
# Two-way ANOVA with interaction
anova_model <- aov(weight ~ group * Light, data = PlantGrowth)
summary(anova_model)
```

```{r}
# Check group counts
table(PlantGrowth$group, PlantGrowth$Light)
```

```{r}

# Post-hoc test if needed
TukeyHSD(anova_model)# Plot interaction
interaction.plot(PlantGrowth$group, PlantGrowth$Light, PlantGrowth$weight,
                 col = c("red","blue"), lty=1:2, ylab="Weight", xlab="Group")
```
```{r}
# Plot interaction
interaction.plot(PlantGrowth$group, PlantGrowth$Light, PlantGrowth$weight,
                 col = c("red","blue"), lty=1:2, ylab="Weight", xlab="Group")
```

```{r}
# Boxplots to visualize distribution across factors
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(PlantGrowth, aes(x=group, y=weight, fill=Light)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title="Weight by Group and Light Condition")
```
```{r}
# Check normality of residuals (Shapiro-Wilk test)
anova_model <- aov(weight ~ group * Light, data=PlantGrowth)
shapiro.test(residuals(anova_model))
```

```{r}
# Check homogeneity of variance (Levene's Test)
library(car)
leveneTest(weight ~ group*Light, data=PlantGrowth)
```


```{r}
## MANOVA Example

# Load iris
data("iris")
head(iris)

# Add a second factor (e.g., Soil Type: Sandy, Clay)
set.seed(42)
iris$Soil <- rep(c("Sandy", "Clay"), length.out=nrow(iris))
iris$Soil <- factor(iris$Soil)
```

```{r}
# Quick look at data
str(iris)
summary(iris)
```
```{r}
# Check factor counts
table(iris$Species, iris$Soil)
```

```{r}
# MANOVA: multiple responses
manova_model <- manova(cbind(Sepal.Length, Sepal.Width, Petal.Length, Petal.Width) ~ Species * Soil, data = iris)
summary(manova_model, test="Pillai")  # Pillai's trace
summary.aov(manova_model)  # ANOVA for each dependent variable
```

```{r}
# Boxplots for each dependent variable by Species
library(reshape2)
iris_long <- melt(iris, id.vars=c("Species","Soil"))
ggplot(iris_long, aes(x=Species, y=value, fill=Soil)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales="free_y") +
  labs(title="Dependent Variables by Species and Soil Type")

```
```{r}
# Check correlations among dependent variables
cor(iris[1:4])
```

```{r}
# Check MANOVA assumptions
# 1. Multivariate normality (using mvnormtest)
library(mvnormtest)
mshapiro.test(t(as.matrix(iris[1:4])))  # Shapiro test for multivariate normality
```
